label: Stat part (has relic)
description: Adds an offset to the stat when the colony possesses an ideology relic.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Flat offset added to the stat when a relic is held by the colony.
